description: D4 off-genre census (session-11, 14q item 3; Pd4=.75): the SAME frozen Phase-0 20 topics (set_a+set_b) recast into FOUR creative-narrative strata - census-matched WITHIN genre (structure mirrors the frozen 4-stratum protocol exactly: stratum_idx feeds make_seed, order FROZEN). Enactor ops choice journaled 2026-07-16; stop-and-surface fires only on census surprises in the data, never improvised post-hoc.

set_a: Teaching a child to ride a bike
set_b: How memory works in the brain
set_c: How vaccines train the immune system
Photosynthesis and how plants make food
The role of fungi in ecosystems
What makes software easy to maintain
The principles of good interface design
The legacy of the printing press
set_d: How architecture shapes how we feel
How to plan a long journey
How to choose where to live
What it means to understand something

vmb_stage0_strata.description: D4 creative-narrative strata (frozen at staging, before any gen): four narrative frames over the frozen 20 topics; NO system prompt (bare, matching the A5 cell convention).

strata.name: scene_dialogue
strata.template: Write a scene where two characters discuss {topic}.
